headline: Apple's Recent High-Profile Departures Just Beginning, Tim Cook May Not Go Anywhere Soon, Says Gurman
summary: Apple, Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) has been hit with a new problem  — and, this time, it has nothing to do with its much-loved product portfolio or its growing services business.

headline: In A Revealing Email, Ron Baron Had This Friendly Advice For Elon Musk
summary: Although billionaire  Ron Baron  has made no bones about his admiration for Elon Musk  and Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA

headline: Elon Musk's Twitter Reactivates Mexican Drug Cartel Accounts, Traffickers Using Social Media To Recruit & Intimidate
summary: Prominent members of Mexico's drug cartels are using Twitter to recruit new members, threaten rival gangs, post violent images and videos and glorify drug trafficking, according to an Alliance to Counter Crime Online (ACCO) report.
